payload.description: QBECodeGen class with state vars, emit helpers, string escaping, register/label counters, toQBEType mapping. Write initial qbe_codegen.ts with the class shell and utility methods. Test: verify class can be instantiated and toQBEType maps correctly.
payload.title: Core infrastructure & class skeleton

payload.description: String constant collection (collectStringConstants), QBE data section generation (data $str.N = { b "...", b 0 }), string dedup via stringNameMap, UTF-8 escaping for QBE format. Test: generate QBE data for various string literals.
payload.title: String constants & data section

payload.description: NumberLiteral (int + float hex), BooleanLiteral, StringLiteral (reference to data section), Identifier (load from alloc). Test: verify correct QBE IL for each literal type.
payload.title: Literal expressions

payload.description: Arithmetic (+,-,*,/,%), comparison (==,!=,<,>,<=,>=), logical (&&,||), bitwise (&,|,^,<<,>>), unary (-,!,~). Handle int vs float dispatch. String equality via string_eq. Test: verify QBE IL for arithmetic, comparisons, logical ops.
payload.title: Binary & unary expressions

payload.description: Direct function calls, print/println dispatch, math builtins (sqrt,sin,cos etc), type conversion (str, int_from_string, f64_to_string). Test: verify call instruction generation.
payload.title: Simple call expressions

payload.description: VariableDeclaration with alloc+store, AssignmentExpression for new bindings (:=) and reassignment (=), type inference for the alloc. Index target assignment (array[i]=v, map[k]=v). Member target assignment (struct.field=v). Test: verify alloc/store/load patterns.
payload.title: Variable declarations & assignments

payload.description: Conditional (if/else), WhileLoop, ForLoop, ForInRange, ForEachLoop, ForInIndex, ForInMap, Break, Continue, Block. Include loop stack management and interrupt checks at back-edges. Test: verify branch/jump patterns for each loop type.
payload.title: Control flow statements

payload.description: Sync FunctionDeclaration with params, return type, gc_push_frame/gc_pop_frame. Async stub (just normal function that calls mog_future_new etc). ReturnStatement. Function attribute detection. Test: verify function definition QBE IL.
payload.title: Function declarations

payload.description: ArrayLiteral (array_alloc + array_set loop), ArrayFill ([val; count] with loop), MapLiteral (map_new + map_set). Test: verify data structure construction IL.
payload.title: Array & map literals

payload.description: StructDeclaration (register in structDefs), StructLiteral (gc_alloc + store fields at 8-byte offsets), MemberExpression for struct field access (add offset + load), SoAConstructor. Test: verify struct allocation and field access.
payload.title: Struct declarations & literals

payload.description: MemberExpression (string.len, array.len, struct fields, SoA transposed, package-qualified, map fallback). IndexExpression (array, map, string, nested, pointer). SliceExpression. Test: verify access patterns.
payload.title: Member & index expressions

payload.description: Lambda lifting to top-level function, env struct allocation via gc_alloc_closure, captured variable storage/loading at 8-byte offsets, closure fat pointer (fn_ptr + env_ptr), indirect calls through closure. Function wrappers for named functions used as values. Test: verify closure creation and invocation.
payload.title: Closures & lambdas

payload.description: TemplateLiteral with string parts and expression interpolation, type-based conversion (i64_to_string, f64_to_string), string_concat chaining. Test: verify f-string IL generation.
payload.title: Template literals & f-strings

payload.description: MatchExpression with LiteralPattern, WildcardPattern, VariantPattern (ok/err/some/none). Result/Optional type patterns with runtime calls. Test: verify match dispatch IL.
payload.title: Match expressions

payload.description: Ok, Err, Some, None expressions, PropagateExpression (?), IsSome/IsNone/IsOk/IsErr checks with optional binding. TryCatch. Test: verify tagged union operation IL.
payload.title: Result/Optional types

payload.description: MogValue construction on stack, mog_cap_call_out invocation with explicit output pointer, capability declaration emission, async capability detection from .mogdecl. Test: verify capability call IL.
payload.title: Capability calls (Host FFI)

payload.description: TensorConstruction, tensor method calls (.sum, .mean, .reshape etc), tensor binary ops, dtype mapping. Test: verify tensor-related call generation.
payload.title: Tensor operations

payload.description: generate() method: collect functions, detect async, emit string data, generate function IR, emit main() with gc_init/gc_push_frame. Handle async main with event loop. Handle CLI args. Test: verify complete program IL generation.
payload.title: Main entry point generation

payload.description: generateModuleQBEIR for multi-package, package prefix name mangling, import handling, pub declarations. Test: verify cross-module call generation.
payload.title: Module support

payload.description: Element-wise array operations (vectorized loops), matrix multiply/add via runtime calls, dot product. Test: verify vector operation loop generation.
payload.title: Vector/matrix operations

payload.description: Run existing Mog test suite through QBE backend. Compare outputs with LLVM backend. Fix any discrepancies. Build showcase.mog with QBE.
payload.title: Integration test suite

payload.description: Create rqbe/ crate. Define all IR types: Ref enum, Op (90 opcodes), Ins, Phi, Blk, Tmp, Con, Mem, Fn, Typ, Field, Dat, Lnk, BSet, Alias, Use, Target. Define typed index newtypes (BlkId, TmpId, ConId, MemId, TypId). Define Cls (Kw/Kl/Ks/Kd). Define jump types. Implement Display for IR pretty-printing. Port ops.h as Op enum.
payload.title: Crate + IR types

payload.description: Implement top-level compile() that calls each pass in order (matching func() in main.c): abi0 → fillrpo → fillpreds → filluse → promote → ssa → filluse → ssacheck → fillalias → loadopt → filluse → fillalias → coalesce → filluse → ssacheck → copy → filluse → fold → abi1 → simpl → fillpreds → filluse → isel → fillrpo → filllive → fillloop → fillcost → spill → rega → simpljmp → fillpreds → fillrpo → emitfn. All passes are stub functions. Create public API: compile(input, target) → String.
payload.title: Pipeline + public API

payload.description: Implement BSet (bitset: init, zero, count, set, clr, copy, union, inter, diff, equal, iter, has). Implement string interning (intern/str). Port hash(). Port emit()/emiti()/idup()/icpy() instruction buffer helpers. Port newtmp(), chuse(), newcon(), getcon(), addcon(), salloc(). Port cmpop()/cmpneg()/clsmerge()/phicls()/argcls()/isreg()/iscmp().
payload.title: Bitset + utilities

payload.description: Port lex(), lexinit() from parse.c. Hand-written tokenizer with perfect hash for QBE keywords. Token types: number, string, newline, ident, keyword, sigil. Handle: integer literals (decimal, hex, 0x), float literals (s_/d_ prefix), string literals with escapes, all operator tokens.
payload.title: Parser: tokenizer

payload.description: Port parsetyp(), parsefields(), parsedat(), parselnk() from parse.c. Parse type definitions (struct/union with field lists), data definitions (DB/DH/DW/DL/DZ with refs and strings), linkage attributes (export, thread, section).
payload.title: Parser: types + data

payload.description: Port parsefn(), parseline(), parserefl(), parsecls(), typecheck() from parse.c. The big piece: parse function definitions with params, basic blocks (labels), phi nodes, instructions with 0-2 args, calls with argument lists, jump/branch/return terminators. State machine (PLbl/PPhi/PIns/PEnd). Build Fn struct with all blocks, tmps, cons.
payload.title: Parser: functions

payload.description: Port fillpreds() and fillrpo() and newblk() from cfg.c. Compute predecessor lists for each block. Compute reverse post-order via DFS with loop-depth tie-breaking. Store rpo as Vec<BlkId> on Function.
payload.title: CFG: predecessors + RPO

payload.description: Port filldom(), sdom(), dom(), fillfron() from cfg.c. Iterative dominator computation (Cooper-Harvey-Kennedy algorithm). Dominance frontier computation. sdom() for strict dominance, dom() for dominance query.
payload.title: CFG: dominators + frontiers

payload.description: Port fillloop(), loopiter(), simpljmp() from cfg.c. Natural loop detection via back-edges with recursive marking, 10x nesting multiplier. Jump chain simplification with union-find.
payload.title: CFG: loops + jump simplification

payload.description: Port ssa(), phiins(), renblk(), getstk(), rendef(), filluse(), ssacheck() from ssa.c. Standard dominance-frontier SSA: compute defs/uses per tmp, insert phi nodes at dominance frontiers, rename temporaries with scoped name stacks (walk dominator tree). Replace C Name free-list with Vec arena.
payload.title: SSA construction

payload.description: Port fillalias(), getalias(), alias(), escapes() from alias.c (220 lines). Flow-insensitive alias classification: ALoc/AEsc/AUnk/ACon/ASym. Track pointer arithmetic for offset-based alias queries. Return MustAlias/MayAlias/NoAlias with offset deltas.
payload.title: Alias analysis

payload.description: Port loadopt() from load.c (493 lines). Store-to-load forwarding: walk backward through instructions and across CFG predecessors to find stores satisfying loads. Insert phi nodes at join points. Handle partial overlaps via bit-shifting and masking. loadsz()/storesz() helpers.
payload.title: Load optimization

payload.description: Port promote() from mem.c. Mem2reg: promote uniformly-accessed stack allocs to SSA temporaries. Detect allocs used only through loads/stores of uniform size.
payload.title: Memory: slot promotion

payload.description: Port coalesce() from mem.c. Backward liveness analysis on stack slots, dead store elimination, greedy size-sorted fusion of non-overlapping slot live ranges.
payload.title: Memory: slot coalescing

payload.description: Port fold() from fold.c (535 lines). Sparse Conditional Constant Propagation: two worklists (flow edges + SSA uses), lattice per tmp (Top/constant/Bot). Fold integer and float operations. Dead edge pruning, unreachable block removal.
payload.title: Constant folding (SCCP)

payload.description: Port copy() from copy.c (229 lines). Build copy-of map in RPO. Detect identity ops (copy, add/sub/or/xor/shift by 0, mul/div by 1, redundant extensions). Worklist-based phi simplification (Braun et al.) to resolve mutually-referencing phi clusters.
payload.title: Copy propagation

payload.description: Port simpl() from simpl.c (82 lines). Replace blit0/blit1 pairs with sequences of individual load/store ops of decreasing granularity (8→4→2→1 bytes).
payload.title: Blit lowering

payload.description: Port filllive(), liveon() from live.c (144 lines). Iterative backward dataflow: compute in/out/gen bitsets per block. Track peak live counts per register class (int/fp). Account for caller-save clobbers around calls.
payload.title: Liveness analysis

payload.description: Port fillcost(), spill() from spill.c (538 lines). Cost-based heuristic weighted by loop depth. When register pressure exceeds target limits, cheapest temps evicted to stack. 4B/8B slot packing. Handle parallel moves as atomic units.
payload.title: Spill cost + insertion

payload.description: Port rega() from rega.c (698 lines). Priority-based linear-scan with hint propagation. RMap struct for register↔tmp tracking. Parallel move resolution (pmrec cycle detection with swap/copy). Block ordering by loop nesting (carve). Phi resolution with bridge blocks.
payload.title: Register allocation

payload.description: Port arm64 abi0 from arm64/abi.c. Parameter/return lowering: AAPCS64 R0-R7 GP, V0-V7 FP. Struct classification (by-value ≤16B, HFA up to 4 floats, indirect pointer for large). Apple vararg model. elimsb() for sub-byte elimination.
payload.title: ARM64 ABI pass 0

payload.description: Port arm64 abi1 from arm64/abi.c. Call lowering: argument emission to registers/stack, callee-save frame setup/teardown (stp/ldp pairs), return value placement, stack alignment.
payload.title: ARM64 ABI pass 1

payload.description: Port isel() from arm64/isel.c (317 lines). Immediate classification (12-bit, shifted-12-bit, 24-bit composite, logical bitmask). Comparison folding (negative → cmn). Comparison-branch fusion. Apple TLS sequences. Alloc→salloc lowering.
payload.title: ARM64 instruction selection

payload.description: Port emitfn() from arm64/emit.c (644 lines). The omap[] table mapping 57 QBE ops to ARM64 mnemonics. Emit: arithmetic, FP ops, loads/stores (6+4 variants), extensions, conversions, comparisons (cmp/cmn/fcmpe), cset with 18 conditions, branches, bl/blr/ret, stp/ldp. Apple-specific: _ prefix, @page/@pageoff relocations.
payload.title: ARM64 assembly emission

payload.description: Port emitdat(), emitfnlnk(), stashbits(), emitfin(), macho_emitfin() from emit.c (244 lines). Data emission (.byte/.short/.int/.quad/.ascii/.fill), BSS detection, function linkage (.text, .globl), FP constant dedup and emission to __TEXT,__literal4/8, DWARF debug directives (.file/.loc).
payload.title: Shared emission utilities

payload.description: Port printfn(), printref() from parse.c for debugging/testing. Print functions in QBE IL text format: function signature, blocks with phi nodes, instructions, jumps. This is essential for test comparison and debugging.
payload.title: IR printer

payload.description: Create Rust test runner: read .ssa test files from vendor/qbe-1.2/test/, extract embedded C driver (# >>> driver sections) and expected output (# >>> output), compile QBE IL via rqbe::compile(), assemble with as, link with cc, run, check output/return code. Integration test harness in rqbe/tests/.
payload.title: Port test infrastructure

payload.description: Port QBE .ssa test files for basic operations: arithmetic, comparisons, control flow, simple functions. Files: sum.ssa, eucl.ssa, fpcnv.ssa, double.ssa, and any basic op tests.
payload.title: Port arithmetic/basic tests

payload.description: Port abi1-8.ssa test files covering struct passing (by-value, indirect), varargs, return conventions, HFA, multi-register returns.
payload.title: Port ABI tests

payload.description: Port load1-3.ssa, mem1-3.ssa tests for store-to-load forwarding, slot promotion, slot coalescing.
payload.title: Port memory/load tests

payload.description: Port isel1-3.ssa, spill1.ssa, rega1.ssa tests for instruction selection, spilling, and register allocation.
payload.title: Port isel/spill/rega tests

payload.description: Port algorithmic test programs: collatz.ssa, prime.ssa, mandel.ssa, queen.ssa, and similar compute-intensive tests.
payload.title: Port algorithm tests

payload.description: Port floating point and type conversion tests: fpcnv.ssa, double.ssa, cast tests, extension/truncation tests.
payload.title: Port float/conversion tests

payload.description: Port remaining tests: TLS (thread-local), dynalloc, dark types, blit, copy/phi edge cases, vararg, and any other .ssa files not covered by other tasks.
payload.title: Port advanced tests

payload.description: After Phase 2, identify and fix all parser-related test failures. Trace through test inputs, compare against C QBE output, fix parsing bugs.
payload.title: Fix failing tests: parser

payload.description: Fix all SSA construction and CFG analysis test failures. Verify dominators, frontiers, phi insertion, renaming produce correct output.
payload.title: Fix failing tests: SSA + CFG

payload.description: Fix all optimization pass failures (fold, copy, simpl, load, alias, mem). Compare IR before/after each pass against C QBE reference.
payload.title: Fix failing tests: optimizations

payload.description: Fix spill and register allocation failures. Verify register assignment, parallel move resolution, spill slot assignment.
payload.title: Fix failing tests: spill + regalloc

payload.description: Fix ARM64 instruction selection, ABI, and assembly emission failures. Compare generated assembly against C QBE reference output.
payload.title: Fix failing tests: ARM64 codegen

payload.description: Replace qbe process spawning and C FFI in compiler/src/compiler.rs with direct rqbe::compile() calls. Add rqbe as a path dependency in compiler/Cargo.toml. Update compile_to_binary() to use in-process QBE.
payload.title: Wire rqbe into Mog compiler

payload.description: Run all 1,145 Mog Rust compiler tests with rqbe backend. Fix any integration issues. All tests must pass.
payload.title: Run Mog test suite with rqbe

payload.description: Build and run showcase.mog through the full pipeline: Mog source → Rust compiler → rqbe → as → ld → execute. Verify all 28 sections produce correct output.
payload.title: Run showcase end-to-end

payload.description: Compare compile times: old pipeline (spawn qbe process + as) vs new (in-process rqbe + as). Use existing benchmark suite at benchmarks/run_benchmarks.ts. Report speedup.
payload.title: Benchmark rqbe vs C QBE
